_description: Was T3 (no competitors); now a new competitor has appeared → T3→T1 or T2a, tier-transition emitted

_expected.note: If own position=1 and beats competitor → T2a; else → T1. new-competitor-entered Notável also emitted.

_note: New competitor (NewCompetitor at 2600) entered. Was T3. Own price=2500 < 2600 → own is in 1st. hasCompetitors=true + currentPosition=1 → T3→T2a. Tier-transition Rotina emitted. new-competitor-entered Notável emitted (reconciliation Story 7.7). Cadence: 1440 → 15.
